rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: QBot rundll32.exe Non-standard File Proxy Execution (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: QBot rundll32.exe Non-standard File Proxy Execution (RedCanary Threat Detection
  Report)
id: bb1cfac0-eca2-4803-9acd-aa75f5b84ff4
status: experimental
description: Detects Rundll32.exe process creations with non-standard file types denoted
  by excluding the common file types from the command-=line selection. Part of the
  RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/qbot/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.s0650
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \rundll32.exe
  filter:
    CommandLine|contains:
    - .dll
    - .cpl
    - .ax
    - .ocx
    - '.inf'
  condition: selection and not filter
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
